uploadPrompt: Xog soo geli si aad u aragto kala-qaybinta faa'iidada
askAskBizPrompt: I tus kala-qaybinta dakhliga iyo faa'iidada ganacsigayga
modalSubtitle: Guji cabbir kasta si aad u faahfaahiso · {dataSource}
detailFooterPos: Ku saleysan {count} wax-dhaqaaleed 30-kii cisho ee ugu dambeeyay.
detailFooterHealth: La barbardhig calaamadaha dhibcaha caafimaadka. Ku xir xisaabinta si aad u hesho qiimayaal sax ah.
drillStockHoldingNote: Kharashka hayntada kaydka wuxuu saameeyaa faa'iidooyinkaaga. Saami kayd-ilaa-dakhli oo ka sarreeya 50% wuxuu tilmaami karaa kayd xad-dhaaf ah.
drillOperatingNote: Kharashaadka shaqada waxaa ka mid ah kirada, adeegyada, kharashka shaqaalaha iyo kharashaadka kale. Ku xir xogtaada xisaabinta si aad u hesho tirooyin sax ah.
drillNetMarginNote: Faa'iidadaada saafiga ah waa {margin}% iyada oo ku saleysan xogta POS. Tan waxay ka tarjumaysaa oo keliya faa'iidada badeecada; ku xir xisaabinta si aad u hesho faa'iido iyo khasaare buuxa.
drillPromptRevenue: Waa maxay isbeddellada dakhligayga, ilaha dakhliga ugu sarreeya, sideen u kordhin karaa iibka?
drillPromptCogs: Ii kala qaybi qiimaha alaabta la iibiyay — badeecooyinkee ayaa leh saamiga kharashka ugu sarreeya?
drillPromptGrossProfit: Falanqee faa'iidooyinkayga guud — badeecooyinkee ayaa ugu faa'iido badan iyo ugu faa'iido yar?
drillPromptOperating: Waa maxay kharashaadkayga shaqada sideen u dhimin karaa kharashaadka guud?
drillPromptStockCost: I tus kharashaadka hayntada kaydka, alaabta si dhaqso leh u socota, iyo alaabta kaydka ee dhimatay
drillPromptNetMargin: I sii falanqayn faa'iidada saafiga ah oo buuxa oo leh talooyin lagu kordhinayo faa'iidada
